entry.title: Creating a new Crystal Report and using two Parameters to filter data, then.....
entry.content:
Crystal Report Version :  2010

I already have the SQL Select statement to get the data, now, in order to filter the data using two Dates as a Date range, I need to create the Starting Date and End Date, I started doing that.  Then, I tried to use those two parameters in the COMMAND file I created, but is not working, it means all the data is passing. thru.

Those two parameters,  I need to use as the End Date : the Current Date, I created as p_CurrentDate.

And for the Beginning Date, I need to use a calculated value as :  The first Parameter minus 30 days,  it means  :  f_CurrentDate - 30 Days.

These  should be taken by default, to be run by SAP BI and creating an excel file.

Then.

First Paremeter :  p_CurrentDate :  Taking the CurrentDate from the System

Second Parameter :  p_CurrentDate - 30 Days.Date,

But, the user, also, could run the Crystal report to get a different period of time, it means the CurrentDate would be different, because it becomes the end date, then, the Begin Date sould be equeally 30 days before.

So, the first parameter ( p_CurrentDate ), should be flexible to get the really Current Date or to use a different date to caluclate the second parameter, maybe using a formula.

So, for some reason, when I run the report, is not taking the two parameters to filter the data and show only the records in that Date range.

May I missing something in the parameters Settings?

I attached a file with the setup of that Parameter, the second one is very similar.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM Test Automation API GET Request
entry.content: Dear maikkiam, since an answer was provided to your question, and there has been no other activity on the topic, we have accepted the answer as a solution on your behalf. You can un-accept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough or if you have further questions. Thank you for bringing this question to SAP Community! Best regards, Paula

entry.title: Re: Deprecation of Rehire Inactive Employee (1H 2025)
entry.content:
Hi,

With rehire active employee being deprecated, how do we rehire former global assignees into the host country after ending global assignment? The only way to do this today is through rehire inactive employee, as  the rehire using duplicate match feature in 'Add New Employee' does not show the global assignments which have ended in the past or future.

Regards

Saswati

entry.title: [SAP Build Process Automation] Desktop Agent does not synchronize deployed projects and stuck logs
entry.content:
Dear SAP Build Process Automation Community:

I'm having a persistent and very frustrating issue with my SAP Build Process Automation desktop agent. It doesn't seem to sync deployed projects despite seemingly correct configuration and several troubleshooting attempts. I would greatly appreciate any help, suggestions, or diagnostics based on your experiences.SAP Build Process Automation 

 

The core problem (with the desktop agent!):

My Desktop Agent (v3.37.57 on Windows 11) constantly displays the message "It appears no projects have been received yet" in the "Projects" window. Most worryingly, its local logs ("History/Events") are completely blocked, showing the last activity as [Exact date of capture, e.g., June 9, 2025], even though it is [Current date, e.g., June 18, 2025].

This indicates that the agent is not processing or updating its status locally, nor is it downloading projects that have been deployed.

 

Project context and configuration (Everything looks fine in the cloud!):

I've set up a project to automate the mass update of fixed asset master records in SAP S/4HANA Cloud. The cloud configuration appears to be correct:

Project: Mass Update Asset Master Data (57O).
Cloud Status: Deployed and started in RPADeveloper environment (confirmed in "Environments" > "Projects").
Automation Launcher: The Mass Update Asset Master Data (57O) artifact (Automation Launcher type) is configured with the main automation (MassUpdateAssetMasterData) in the "Start Manually from Agent" section.
Agent Connection to Cloud:
In the BTP lobby (Environments > RPADeveloper > Agent Management), my agent (NDTSCZ1166) appears as "Inactive" and "Connected".
In the agent's local settings (Configuration > Tenants), the connection to efdadad3trial.us10.process-automation.build.cloud.sap is "Active".

entry.title: Activate SAP EAM Fiori Apps
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are planning to activate EAM Fiori Apps on S/4 HANA 2023. Do we have to activate Business functions starting with LOG_EAM_SIMPLICITY?

Here are the few from the list of the apps we are trying to activate.

  • Manage Maintenance Notifications and Orders (F4604)
  • Find Maintenance Notification (F2071)
  • Find Technical Object(F2072)

entry.title: EXIT_/SAPAPO/SAPLBOP_040 Business event is not getting flipped
entry.content:
Hi,

 I m trying to flip the Business event for a Order from 'A' to a another business event 'ZA' based on certain condition through /SAPAPO/BOP but business event is  not updated to /sapapo/atpparam table . So please  help out whether do i need to change any other field in the CT_REQ .

SCM APO Integration (CIF)  SCM APO Global ATP

entry.title: Re: Inside ABAP Conf 2025: Innovation, Insight, and the Power of Community
entry.content: If anyone is interested - I also wrote about the conference highlights here. There are links to specific sessions and some more information. Cheers!

entry.title: Re: Error in data action execution
entry.content: Dear Ganjos, Have you found the root of the problem? We are facing the same issue.

entry.title: Re: Final settlement is not considering the previous sett...
entry.content:
Are you using item partner as split criteria of your settlement document? If yes, this is the issue. As soon as you use an item partner which is not SP or SH (example: you use sales agent ES), then it causes issues.

I'm in the process of understanding if the issue is with any additional partner but SP or SH or if is with a partner like ES which might be there on certain items and not on others. I'm opening an incident tomorrow and let you know.

I'm also available for a call if it can help. I'm pretty familiar with frustration of condition contracts and settlement management.

entry.title: Re: Configuration of Serial Number Management in SAP EWM
entry.content: Sai, its a great job, Thanks for sharing this.

entry.title: Batch replication stuck in SMQ2
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

The following error occurs in the ERP system (S/4HANA), which is connected to a decentralized EWM system on S/4HANA (02/10/2024 FPS):

When I create a batch in the inbound delivery in the decentralized EWM system, the batch is replicated to the ERP system but sometimes gets stuck in SMQ2 with the error message: "Object does not exist."
Function module is /SPE/BATCH_SAVE_REPLICA.

This issue happens from time to time — most of the time, batch replication works fine. I am currently investigating the reason why the system occasionally throws this error.

entry.title: Re: LMS items are opening in new page and redirecting to...
entry.content: @naveenaNehra26, if this is happening when the user is in the enhanced search, the new tab/window would be expected (KBA 3599344). The invalid login shouldn't be happening though. Can you review the browser settings to rule it out as the cause (KBA 2310570)?

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam Topics
entry.content: Hi , Would there be any topic around Data Analytics , with SAC, Datasphere and BDC

entry.title: SAP Code Jam Topics
entry.content:
Hi All,

Did you all have an opportunity to check out the Code Jam topics, how about presenting your finding in one of the Inside Track. 

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-codejam-blog-posts/sap-codejam-topics/ba-p/221407

 

Cheers,

Sai

entry.title: Re: Physical Inventory Process in SAP EWM
entry.content:
Following up on @giurgiuc  comment — since this is a partial count based on volume, what happens with the stock of the listed items?

Can transactions still be performed with those materials? For example, is it possible to sell, move, or transfer them to another location during the count?

entry.title: How to display RF Message in a separate Screen - RF Screens with Touch Enablement
entry.content:
In EWM standard RF transactions, the following standard function codes are only available as function key but not as pushbutton prior to S4 HANA 2020

  • Clear input field value ('CLEAR') - F6
  • Return to previous step ('BACK') - F7
  • Display value list of actual field ('LIST') - F8
  • Display message on separate screen ('FULLMS') - F9

Example: If an error message is triggered during execution of a particular RF transaction( I.e Receiving HU by HU MO), the message is partially displayed in current session and to display full message, it is required to press 'F9' to display the full message and then press 'F7' to return to the previous Screen.

On devices without hardware function keys, these function codes either must be triggered via a software keypad or by entering the corresponding value in the shortcut field on the RF device. Both possibilities are not user-friendly and decrease the performance of the RF use

Solution: From S4 HANA 2020 onwards, SAP has released a note '2957972 - RF Framework: Add Standard Function Codes as Pushbuttons which provides to add F6, F7, F8 and F9 as an easy Push button in RF framework and easy navigation of message in a separate screen w/o usage of pressing these in RF Device.

In /SCWM/PRDVC, presentation profile, SAP has given 4 different attribute to show 'Functions as Push Button to be used based on User UI acceptability.

To use this functionality, customer have to adjust their 'Display Profile' in customizing. To display the function( F6 to F9) as push button along with 'Message display on a Pop-up message Screen' customer has to configure display profile in customizing in RF.

Extended Warehouse Management-->Mobile Data Entry-->Radio Frequency (RF) Framework-->RF Screen Manager. ( Avoid changing in standard **( 8*40) used for mounted screen on forklift  & *2 Portrait Mode( 15*26) generally used for Handheld devices.

Rather copy ** or *2 in your project requirement.

Change here Message display from '1' to '0'. Standard has be default as 1

Ensure to check the Screen manager has correct 'display message'

Good to test once above settings are performed.

Check /SCWM/RFUI in Fiori as well as in ITS( In this example, I am not using MoBgui). The required standard function codes are only available as an easy Push Button:)

Lets test any RF transaction to check 'Display Message' in a separate screen along with Std Functions as push button. 

System has added 4 std pushbuttons along with Screen specific RF pushbuttons. 

Also an easy List view is available to select the required work center( in RF REHU by MO transaction)

Displaying message in separate Screen and easy return to Previous screen.

Below example, error message are directly navigated to a separate screen( without touching F9 button) and one Press enter button navigates to original screen without pressing F7 on Handheld.

There is also a BAdI also /SCWM/EX_RF_ADD_FC_AS_PB  which allows to implement a customer own logic how the standard function codes are added to the pushbutton groups. The BAdI also has an example implementation which shows how function codes GTEXCP (to display valid exception codes), BACK and CLEAR are added to the first pushbutton group.

Thanks for reading. All tests have been performed in S4 HANA 2023 FPS02 Sandbox system.

Refences: 

2957972 - RF Framework: Add Standard Function Codes as Pushbuttons

3234853 - Error Message /SCWM/UI_RF301 while adding Buttons in tcode /SCWM/PRDVC

entry.title: PO custom delivery address not populating for limit line items
entry.content: We have a requirement to show custom delivery address corresponding to limit item of adobeform. However, when we added address using custom fields of  extension point MM_PUR_S4_PO_MODIFY_ITEM, the same is not getting in node of limit item but only purchase order item node. We cannot extend datasource as well.

entry.title: Re: supplier initiated change on existing purchase order
entry.content: what you mean its not legal? the functionality asking supplier initiate change which will be approve by procurement team. This is very general process in procurement organization

entry.title: Re: Crystal Report Viewer inside UpdatePanel displays onl...
entry.content:
Hi Again,

R&D had another look at what you are doing and suggested using this rather that 100%:

If the BestFitPage was set to False, then you had to specify the detailed Width/Height value like below: BestFitPage="false" Height="1200px" ToolPanelView="None" Width="1600px"

Set BestFitPage ="true"

See if that resolves your issue...

Don

entry.title: Re: Custom MDF Analysis Dimension problem - Neuroinclusion
entry.content:
Hi @DariusSoreata - I don't understand why you need to enable External Code from Cust Neuroinclusion object.  This is setup as Primary Person ID so I assume the External Code contain User ID of employee.  But you only enable this column from this object.  For what? 

In Cust Neuroinclusiondetails object, you have External Code setup as Secondary Person ID, that means this field contain Person ID value of employee.  If you already have Secondary Person ID from Cust Neuroinclusiondetails object, why do you need External Code from Cust Neuroinclusion object?  The link between Primary and Secondary Person ID is already available in Employment Info table.  

Maybe try to remove Cust Neuroinclusion object entirely and see if the initial load will process successfully or not.

entry.title: Re: My First RAP Project. Many errors in Child and Parent projection view.
entry.content:
Hi Mio,

Below is my Base entity code.

************Create Interface View****************
 @AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
 @EndUserText.label: 'Booking BO view'
 define view entity ZI_BOOKING_g
   as select from zbooking_data as Booking

   association [1..1] to ztravel_data        as _Travel     on  $projection.TravelUUID = _Travel.travel_uuid
   
   association [1..1] to /DMO/I_Customer           as _Customer   on  $projection.CustomerID   = _Customer.CustomerID
   association [1..1] to /DMO/I_Carrier            as _Carrier    on  $projection.CarrierID    = _Carrier.AirlineID
   association [1..1] to /DMO/I_Connection         as _Connection on  $projection.CarrierID    = _Connection.AirlineID
                                                                  and $projection.ConnectionID = _Connection.ConnectionID
   association [1..1] to /DMO/I_Flight             as _Flight     on  $projection.CarrierID    = _Flight.AirlineID
                                                                  and $projection.ConnectionID = _Flight.ConnectionID
                                                                  and $projection.FlightDate   = _Flight.FlightDate
   association [0..1] to I_Currency                as _Currency   on $projection.CurrencyCode    = _Currency.Currency    
 {
   key booking_uuid          as BookingUUID,
       travel_uuid           as TravelUUID,
       booking_id            as BookingID,
       booking_date          as BookingDate,
       customer_id           as CustomerID,
       carrier_id            as CarrierID,
       connection_id         as ConnectionID,
       flight_date           as FlightDate,
       @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
       flight_price          as FlightPrice,
       currency_code         as CurrencyCode,
       @Semantics.user.createdBy: true
       created_by            as CreatedBy,
       @Semantics.user.lastChangedBy: true
       last_changed_by       as LastChangedBy,
       @Semantics.systemDateTime.localInstanceLastChangedAt: true
       local_last_changed_at as LocalLastChangedAt,

       /* associations */
       _Travel,
       _Customer,
       _Carrier,
       _Connection,
       _Flight,
       _Currency
 }

*********************************************
@AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
 @EndUserText.label: 'Travel BO view'
 define view entity ZI_TRAVEL_G
   as select from ztravel_data as Travel

   association [0..*] to zbooking_data as _Booking on $projection.TravelUUID = _Booking.Travel_UUID
   
   association [0..1] to /DMO/I_Agency       as _Agency   on $projection.AgencyID = _Agency.AgencyID
   association [0..1] to /DMO/I_Customer     as _Customer on $projection.CustomerID = _Customer.CustomerID
   association [0..1] to I_Currency          as _Currency on $projection.CurrencyCode = _Currency.Currency  
 {
   key travel_uuid           as TravelUUID,
       travel_id             as TravelID,
       agency_id             as AgencyID,
       customer_id           as CustomerID,
       begin_date            as BeginDate,
       end_date              as EndDate,
       @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
       booking_fee           as BookingFee,
       @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
       total_price           as TotalPrice,
       currency_code         as CurrencyCode,
       description           as Description,
       overall_status        as TravelStatus,
       @Semantics.user.createdBy: true
       created_by            as CreatedBy,
       @Semantics.systemDateTime.createdAt: true
       created_at            as CreatedAt,
       @Semantics.user.lastChangedBy: true
       last_changed_by       as LastChangedBy,
       @Semantics.systemDateTime.lastChangedAt: true
       last_changed_at       as LastChangedAt,
       @Semantics.systemDateTime.localInstanceLastChangedAt: true
       local_last_changed_at as LocalLastChangedAt,

       /* associations */
       _Booking,
       _Agency,
       _Customer,
       _Currency      
 }

Below is my Projection entity code

 @EndUserText.label: 'Travel BO projection view'
 @AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
 @search.searchable: true
 @Metadata.allowExtensions: true

 define root view entity ZC_TRAVEL_G
   as projection on ZI_TRAVEL_G as Travel
 {
   key TravelUUID,
       @search.defaultSearchElement: true
       TravelID,
       @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity: { name: '/DMO/I_Agency', element: 'AgencyID'} }]
       @ObjectModel.text.element: ['AgencyName']
       @search.defaultSearchElement: true
       AgencyID,
       _Agency.Name       as AgencyName,
       @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity: { name: '/DMO/I_Customer', element: 'CustomerID'} }]
       @ObjectModel.text.element: ['CustomerName']
       @search.defaultSearchElement: true
       CustomerID,
       _Customer.LastName as CustomerName,
       BeginDate,
       EndDate,
       @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
       BookingFee,
       @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
       TotalPrice,
       @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity: { name: 'I_Currency', element: 'Currency'} }]
       CurrencyCode,
       Description,
       TravelStatus,
       LastChangedAt,
       LocalLastChangedAt,

       /* Associations */
       _Agency,
       _Booking : redirected to composition child ZC_BOOKING_G,
       _Currency,
       _Customer   
 }

**********************Child projection Entity***********
@EndUserText.label: 'Booking BO projection view'
 @AccessControl.authorizationCheck: #CHECK
 @search.searchable: true
 @Metadata.allowExtensions: true

 define view entity ZC_BOOKING_G
   as projection on ZI_BOOKING_G as Booking
 {
   key BookingUUID,
       TravelUUID,
       @search.defaultSearchElement: true
       BookingID,
       BookingDate,
       @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ entity : {name: '/DMO/I_Customer', element: 'CustomerID'  } }]
       @ObjectModel.text.element: ['CustomerName']
       @search.defaultSearchElement: true
       CustomerID,
       _Customer.LastName as CustomerName,
       @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{entity: {name: '/DMO/I_Carrier', element: 'AirlineID' }}]
       @ObjectModel.text.element: ['CarrierName']
       CarrierID,
       _Carrier.Name      as CarrierName,
       @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [ {entity: {name: '/DMO/I_Flight', element: 'ConnectionID'},
                                            additionalBinding: [ { localElement: 'CarrierID',    element: 'AirlineID' },
                                                                 { localElement: 'FlightDate',   element: 'FlightDate',   usage: #RESULT},
                                                                 { localElement: 'FlightPrice',  element: 'Price',        usage: #RESULT },
                                                                 { localElement: 'CurrencyCode', element: 'CurrencyCode', usage: #RESULT } ] } ]
       ConnectionID,
       FlightDate,
       @Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CurrencyCode'
       FlightPrice,
       @Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{entity: {name: 'I_Currency', element: 'Currency' }}]
       CurrencyCode,
       LocalLastChangedAt,

       /* associations */
       _Travel : redirected to parent ZC_TRAVEL_G,
       _Customer,
       _Carrier,
       _Connection,
       _Flight
 }

This is a code snippet from SAP learning training.

 

Thank you,

Gargi

entry.title: Trace mode in Integration Suite is not working
entry.content:
Even after changing the log level to Trace in the IFlow, it remains at Info and I cannot view the logs.

 

I have undeployed and redeployed the IFlow, and changed the log level to Trace again, but nothing has changed.

I have also tried using a different browser and clearing the cache, but it had no effect.

Please check and advise.

entry.title: Re: SAP Sustainability Control Tower-Import Greenhouse Gas Emissions from SAP EHS Environment Manage
entry.content:
Hi Tams,

Data collection is to define your Input method, data collection schedule for data import. Data calculation is to calculate your CO2e based on the formula that is being followed.

You have to define the collection items individually and calculate the CO2e as per each material, and can calculate category of emissions, i.e., Scope-1, Scope-2 , etc., under data calculation, and finally can have aggregation at location level.

 

Regards,

Pardha Reddy. C

entry.title: This document could not be opened error
entry.content:
I am getting this issue more and more and constantly losing reports.

Example is:
I have an rpt file that I just edited.  I save the report and close out.  I go back into that same report moments later and receive  the message [filename] This document could not be opened. message.

The file size looks fine, it was only opened in Crystal Reports but I do not know how to get it back to be usable. 
Version is 2020 Support Pack 4 Patch 7 Version 14.3.4.5055

Once or twice is annoying, but I just edited 10 reports to make a change, then moments later, could not re-open any of them.  All lost!  Please advise how I can 'fix' them and stop this from happening.

entry.title: Re: 公有云系统中，量差与价差的核算未能分别体现，全部核算到价差中，没有体现量差，如何处置？
entry.content: 感谢您的帮助，物料价格分析APP中有显示实际消耗的，能够将实际消耗的数量差异及价格差异分别显示，如多消耗了1各物料，但物料价格有收益，实际成本核算中分别处理

entry.title: Re: Understanding ABAP Pipeline Engine used for Data Integration in Datasphere
entry.content: Nice Blog !! Well articulated and nicely summarized.

entry.title: How to add a max aggregation calculation for previous year in a SAP Analytics Cloud Story?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

In SAP Analytics Cloud at the story level, how can you create a variable that captures the maximum monthly value of a numeric field for the year preceding the one selected in a page filter (i.e., that captures the highest monthly value from the prior year)?

I've already created the variable to calculate the current year's maximum monthly value, but I've been unable to build the equivalent for the prior year. The requirement is to display both the current year's and the previous year's maximum monthly values simultaneously.

The story has:

  • Input control for years (single selection) based on budat
  • Input control for months (multiple selection) based on budat
  • Analytic import model consuming from s4 onpremise via cds view

I've tried the following alternatives without success:

Alternative 1: Restricted Measure for the Prior Year based on the MAX Aggregation of the current year:

1) Create a restricted measure for the prior year based on the current year's MAX aggregation: Defined a variable to capture the maximum value of the numeric field (acdoca.hsl) using Aggregation → MAX. This didn't return the correct value for the current year—likely due to the dataset's daily granularity.

2) Workaround: Create a alculated dimension for months. Added a dimension called vMonths to represent the month of each record.

This returns all months across every year in the dataset:

3) Recreate the “current year max” variable using vMonths: Defined a new variable to get the MAX of acdoca.hsl, scoped to the vMonths dimension. This returns the expected result when the page filter selects a single year, so it correctly serves as the “current year max” value.

4) Attempt to derive the prior‑year max from the current‑year variable: Created a restricted measure atop the “current year max” variable, again scoped to vMonths and set to Select by Member → All Members. This, however, still returns the current year's maximum rather than the prior year's.

5) Test using the budat date field: Tried setting budat values via various NAVIGATION options—but all failed.

6) Test using the budat field via SELECTION: Although the variable runs, it never returns the correct prior‑year max value.

Alternative 2: Calculated Measure Using the MAX() Function.

 1) This correctly returns the sum of all monthly values from the preceding year.

2) Apply the MAX() function in a calculated measure: Use a calculated measure with the MAX() function. Instead of yielding the highest single‐month value, it still returns the full annual total for hsl.

Alternative 3: “Overall HSL MAX”

1) Define the overall‑max aggregation variable: Create a variable (hsl_max) that captures the MAX of acdoca.hsl, scoped by the budat date field.

2) Attempt to derive the prior‑year max via a restricted measure: Apply a restricted‑measure filter on hsl_max for the year before the selected one. This approach fails to return the previous year's maximum; it still yields the current selection's max value.

Any guidance would be greatly appreciated. Thank you!

entry.title: Export Control Clarification Request for SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS03 Appliance
entry.content:
Dear SAP Cloud Appliance Library Team,

I am trying to deploy the “SAP S/4HANA 2023 FPS03, Fully-Activated Appliance” via SAP Cloud Appliance Library (SAP CAL). However, I consistently receive the following message:

"Your request is under clarification by export control. We will send you an email as soon as the clarification has been provided."

This error occurs regardless of which template I select related to the SAP S/4HANA appliance.

Is there any way to expedite the export control review, or should I wait for SAP to contact me via email?
I've been waiting for three days already and still no reply.
Any advice or contact method for non-S-user customers would be appreciated.

Here is my information:
- Country: Japan
- Purpose: Internal education and proof of concept (PoC)

Thank you in advance!


Best regards,
a5ymnk

entry.title: Unable to edit Item Text in Post Outgoing Payments app
entry.content:
Hi Team,

The field "Item Text" of the bank account line item can not be filled in app "Post Outgoing Payments".

Thanks,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Unable to edit Item Text in Post Outgoing Payments app
entry.content:
Hi There,

You can kindly refer to the following KBA I created for the detailed steps.
KBA 3311995 - Field Item Text is grayed out in Post Outgoing / Incoming Payments app

Many thanks,

entry.title: 有没有一个报表或者CDS，可以查看所有物料的标注价格、实际价格、库存数量、收发货数量
有没有一个报表或者CDS，可以查看所有物料的历史标准成本和实际成本
Need custom button to download an excel file in RAP application
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

In my RAP application I want to incorporate custom download action in list report page. So that when I click on that I need to download a custom excel sheet. 

Can we achieve this in RAP application, If yes, then how?

if not, what other options I can follow?

Thanks and Regards,

Prasanth.

Thanks

how you wrote those code?

entry.title: Re: Service Order WITH BATCH
entry.content:
Hi Angel,

Currently Batch managed items are not supported for service order in Public Cloud. There is already a CIP request open Improvement Request Details - Customer Influence.

I would suggest you to go through it and Vote if you need same functionality.

Regards,

Vikas

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG costing for co-deployment
entry.content:
Hello,

Please find the details shared by Markus on the below post. It has the documentation explaining the licensing model and how the record counts are considered for different master data objects. 

SAP MDG license model - SAP Community

Regards,

Saravanan

entry.title: Re: supplier initiated change on existing purchase order
entry.content:
so supplier can send order confirmations, you can send multiple ones even if you initially have confirmed the original PO in first place - you can send another one as a supplier

There is a possibility to enable on Buyer/Procurement side Supply Chain monitor that routes all order confirmations with deviations for approval of procurement/buyer/planning team.

second option if you don't use supply chain monitor on Network is to catch these order confirmations in your ERP system and take an action there.

entry.title: Re: LMS items are opening in new page and redirecting to...

entry.title: Re: My First RAP Project. Many errors in Child and Parent...
entry.content:
first four errors clearly describing your header views 'Booking' missing composition and items view 'travel' is missing parent ...

 

its should look like 

booking 

composition [0..*] 

 

and travel 

association to parent

entry.title: Re: Credit checks available in SAP Credit Management (FSCM)
entry.content:
Hello @aditya_2547 ,
I do not have experience with creating per segment parameters for a custom check step.
You could try to enhance view V_UKM_CHCK_STEP or V_UKM_CHCK_CRSGM. See SAP Note 1402424 - Adding own fields to V_UKM_CHCK_STEP
Or you could implement the parameters directly in the code of the customer specific check. In IO_ACCOUNT structure the credit segment is known while executing credit check coding (UKM_CHECK_STEP), so you could control with code how the check on different segments should behave.
Regards,
Edina

entry.title: Re: How to add a max aggregation calculation for previous...
entry.content:
What I tried:

  1. Create a model level calculated measure to read value from previous year: RESTRICT([GC_Fly] ,[d/Date]=Previous("Month" ,12 ) )
  2. Create a story calculated measure with aggregation MAX based on the model calculated measure of step 1. 

This gives me  the right Previous year Max value  on current year.

entry.title: Sales Reporting - Orders Coming and Dispatched %
entry.content:
Hello 

Im looking for a report in SAP 4/HANA Public Cloud (or a CDS report) that I can see sales orders lines and when they were completed i.e. what % are completed next day, what is the average time for them to be complete? 

Thanks

Adam

entry.title: Strategy Group 55: PIRs Consumption with reference to Sales Order Creation.
entry.content:
I'm working with Planned Independent Requirements (PIRs) linked to Characteristic/Configuration Data for Product Variants, and I need your insights to resolve a behavior I’ve encountered.

🎯 Objective:

Create PIRs for a product variant (Strategy Group 55) with assigned characteristics/configuration.

PIRs should only be consumed when a sales order with matching configuration is created.

PIRs should generate planned orders, but not convert to production orders until a matching sales order is received.

Lower-level components can be procured based on PIRs.

🧪 Test Scenario:

MRP View:

Configurable Material (Strategy 25): Individual/Collective = Individual

Product Variant (Strategy 55):

Individual/Collective = Collective

Assigned Configurable Material and completed characteristic assignment.

Maintained Planning Variant with characteristic values.

MD61: Created PIR for Product Variant.

MD04: PIR’s configuration was carried into the planned order, and lower-level components were planned correctly after MRP run.

⚠️ Issue / GAP Identified:
When I create a sales order with a different characteristic combination than the one in the PIR, the PIR is still being consumed - even though the configuration does not match. (other word, to be accurate 95% matches)

📌 Additional Info:

No Planning Table or Planning Profile used (per Strategy 55 behavior).

Assumption: PIR consumption is happening for closest match if no exact match is available.

Has anyone encountered this? Am I missing a key configuration or step to ensure that PIRs are only consumed for 100 % matching configurations?


Would appreciate any guidance or shared experiences!
Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Re: Getting error in SAP Integration Suite IFLOW - Unreso...
entry.content: Request Header is empty in receiver adapter. Check what you are passing when calling directly from the postman. Makesure same is in the receiver adapter also.

this is the guide I am referring to "https://www.bing.com/ck/a?!&&p=e472aaa62d4df1721a8d333d509fe68fb6b4b1a615281ba83a62c975d493a6a3JmltdHM9MTc1MDIwNDgwMA&ptn=3&ver=2&hsh=4&fclid=2695721f-7c13-632d-3d49-66907d5c627b&psq=project+budget+approval+setup&u=a1aHR0cHM6Ly9odWIuc2FwLmNvbS9vZGF0YS8xLjAvY2F0YWxvZy5zdmMvRmlsZXMoJzViNjRlMGRkLWMxNGItNDY3MS04ZDExLTY2OTE3NWU5Njk4ZV9Db25maWd1cmF0aW9uX2FuZF9Vc2VyX0d1aWRlX2Zvcl9Qcm9qZWN0X0J1ZGdldF9BcHByb3ZhbCcpLyR2YWx1ZQ&ntb=1".

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Need custom button to download an excel file in RAP a...
entry.content:
@semantics.url: true

cast(concat( concat('https://<<System>>:<<PORT>>/sap/opu/odata/SAP/Z_SRV/zfileSet

(Mandt=''500'',Filename=',''),concat('''',concat(file_name,''')/$value') ) )

as abap.char( 256 ) ) as file_name

you can add virtual element file_url using odata service and give hyperlink for download  in list report.

entry.title: Re: Automate the Interim Account Update rule using Integration Center Job (Time Off)
entry.content: @Catarina_CCL  - I've added "Notes" for more understandings! Please review and let me know!

entry.title: Re: Automate the Interim Account Update rule using Integration Center Job (Time Off)
entry.content:
@PetraRana 

  1. I've introduced the custom field under time account object to have the filter in the business rules.
  2. The integration center job will map the default values as "Yes"
  3. The business rule have the condition where the changes are allowed only if the integration center field is set as "Yes"
  4. On Then condition, I'm again resetting the field values as "No"

The above steps prevent the rule from executing during unrelated updates—such as imports, manual changes via Manage Data, CPI, or other integrations—appropriate conditions or safeguards should be implemented.

entry.title: Re: Automate the Interim Account Update rule using Integration Center Job (Time Off)
entry.content: @Nept I've added "Notes" for more understandings! Please review and let me know!

entry.title: G/L account renumbering for secondary cost elements
entry.content:
Hello Cloud experts,

I would like to ask your help regarding the G/L account renumbering specifications on CE 2502.

SAP help "Renumbering G/L accounts: Before You Start" describes;

  • G/L accounts not needed must be marked as Not Used during mapping.
    Check all delivered 99999* (secondary cost element) accounts before marking them as Not Used.

  • If you modify the G/L accounts for secondary cost elements, your allocation cycles will not work correctly.

Question;

  1. Is it technically possible to mark "Not used"  to Secondary cost elements ?
  2. What does it means by "MODIFY" the G/L account for secondary cost elements ?
    Renumbering is not permitted? All customers have to use the delivered "9***" secondary cost elements ?

Thank you for your support & Kindly Regards,
Ai

entry.title: Re: How do I consume/display the data of Odata on Fiori App?
entry.content: Please check what your are passing to Document Number ( assuming its a char field). for Changed by , use Text Association to replace SAP ID with User name.

entry.title: Time off workflow not received in Teams after enable SAP SuccessFactors App for Microsoft Teams
entry.content:
After we enabled SAP SuccessFactors App for Microsoft Teams, we found some managers able to received Time off workflow approval while some can"t, is it realated to role-based permissions? What is the necessary permissions should be setup for users? If not, what could be the issue? 

BTW, all managers able to received emails and able to approve absences from system, the only difference is some of them able to receive Teams message but some can"t not.

We installed the APP for all users in MS and the "Microsoft API Permission Type" is Application in Work Tech Configuration. In RBP all managers have the Employee Data

entry.title: Sales & Profitability IFP Calculating Sales Deductions
entry.content:
Hello All,

I hope you're doing well.

I'm currently working on creating a customized Sales & Profitability module by replicating certain dimensions and measures from the standard Integrated Financial Planning (IFP) content into a dummy planning model for demo purposes.

While calculating Net Sales using the formula:
Net Sales = Gross Revenue – Sales Deductions,
I'm facing a challenge specific to the textile industry scenario I'm planning for.

The issue lies in the commission component of Sales Deductions, which varies by customer. For example, Customer A may have a 5% commission rate, while Customer B may have 6%. This variability impacts the net sales calculation.

Could anyone please guide me on how to incorporate customer-specific commission rates into the planning model to accurately calculate Net Sales per customer? do I need to create a separate model for that, data blending capabilities, or be able to incorporate that logic in the data action of main model instead of creating another model

Thank you in advance!

entry.title: Re: How to eliminate Rounding of percentage in SAC Planning
entry.content:
if you are using measure dimension of integer format  then it will round out decimals value to the lowest integer .
first you need to change the measure into decimal value .

even you are not filling values in your measure and filling it on gl_accounts it will behave according to the format of meausre that 
you provided in your model i.e.(integer/decimal).

entry.title: Beyond SAP Cloud - Episode 27: Terraform Run
entry.content:
This tutorial walks through the process of using Terraform to initialize and execute a script that creates directories and sub-accounts in a trial account. We demonstrate how to use the `terraform init` command to set up the necessary Terraform provider and dependencies, followed by `terraform apply` to execute the script. After confirming the execution, the script creates the directories and sub-accounts. We show the process, step by step, and emphasizes the simplicity and speed of setting up resources with Terraform.

Takeaways

  • Terraform initialization begins with running 'terraform init' in the command line to download required providers and dependencies.
  • Once initialized, 'terraform apply' is executed to run the script and implement changes.
  • Terraform first analyzes the script before execution to determine the proposed changes and asks for user confirmation.
  • The script will create directories and sub accounts as defined, and Terraform asks for user confirmation with a 'yes' response to proceed.
  • After confirming, Terraform starts the process of creating directories and sub-accounts based on the script instructions.
  • The script execution may take a few minutes, during which directories and sub-accounts are created one by one.
  • Once the process is complete, the sub accounts and directories will be available in the trial account.
  • The user can verify the successful creation by refreshing the BTP trial account to see the new directories and sub-accounts.
  • The created directories include 'directory administration' with two sub-accounts and 'directory application' with three sub-accounts.
  • Terraform streamlines the creation of complex structures, making the process of managing directories and sub accounts faster and easier.
  • The entire process of initializing, applying, and confirming Terraform scripts to set up directories and sub-accounts can be completed within minutes.

I tried using Rollback Entities but it doesnt allow in a behavior class.

I understand there are other API that support Sales Order Simulate but I would like to ask if there is a way using business objects.

entry.title: SUNAT Withholding Agents in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition – Peru Localization
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I’m currently working with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition using the Peru localization, and I would like to ask if anyone has information about the possibility of mass updating the SUNAT withholding agent data.

As you may know, SUNAT regularly publishes updated files listing current withholding agents. I’m trying to determine whether there is a standard way to import or update this information in bulk, instead of maintaining it manually.

If anyone has implemented this or is aware of an SAP note, best practice, or functionality that supports this kind of update, I’d really appreciate your input.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Luisa Fernanda Ruiz

entry.title: Re: PayComponentNon Recurring, OneTime Payments is it pos...
entry.content: Yes we can restrict through RBP but the requirement is HR team should not be able to edit the data filled record but should have the access to insert a new record which is again edit permission

entry.title: Re: How to use Characteristic ID and Phrase Key to find l...
entry.content:
Hello

from function point of view as mentioned): normaly the demand is solved by a user.

Step 1: by using the EHS search capability a so called "hit list" is generated

Step 2: then it need to be checked by the user: is there a material assigned to the identfied objetc and if yes. list them

The issue is the second step. Here the options in SAP standard are limited

The "BAPI" is only useful for the second step and not for the first step

BUt as the first step is done (from technical perspective) by using a "function module" to which some parameter are handed over:

You can write down a E2E process which could be done 100% by an ABAP routine

Many people "hate" the EHS data model: therefore they try to extract the data to BW or other tool for doing the same story. This is possible as well.

There is a small "but":  based on the number of data the inquiry can take longer; and as the data will change over the time: any day you might get a different (but clearly correct) result

I wish the best

C.B.

Tsvetinka

entry.title: Re: Product Compliance: Transition to SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello

in the mean time SAP is providing more and more public APIs for "read" and "write" of data.  But still is is not clear how to "move logical" the data from A to B.

One of the hurdles are: if you are not sing SAP/3E data model: the "move" is very complex. If you use customer driven proeprties. Move is not possible.

We will investigate the 2025 release (if available) to again do a kind of "prestudy" to list he pros/cons in the data migration.

As well: there is still some hope that the so called 3E Adapter might help.

C.B.

entry.title: Re: EBS configuration problem
entry.content:
Hello Misha,

Please try to setup the rule like this: 

And deactivate all the search strings, because you don't need them for the basic scenario. So first step is to test if it works without search strings.

Posting logic would be:

area 1

Bank
@ Clearing account

Area 2
Clearing account
@ Customer (open item clearing)

Best Regards,
Henk Hoogerbrug

entry.title: Re: RSA/ECB/PKCS1 padding Encryption in SAP ABAP
entry.content:
Has anyone resolved the issue of RSA/ECB/PKCS1Padding encryption in SAP ABAP using a public key? The public key I have is more than 600 characters long. I need to follow the RSA/ECB/PKCS1Padding standard, and I have used the function module SSF_KRN_ENVELOPE. If anyone has any idea or solution, please reply.

The steps i need to follow in ABAP : 

1.Generate 16-digit random number.Say RANDOMNO1.

2.Encrypt RANDOMNO1 using RSA/ECB/PKCS1Padding and ICICIPublicKey.

3.Encode the output of step 2 using Base64.Say ENCR_KEY.

4.Generate another 16-digit random number.Say RANDOMNO2.

5.Concatenate RANDOMNO2 and data in JSON format.Say DATA.

DATA=RANDOMNO2+data in JSONformat

6.Perform AES/CBC/PKCS5Padding encryption on DATA using RANDOMNO1 as key and RANDOMNO2 as IV.

7.Encode the output of step6 using Base64.Say ENCR_DATA.

entry.title: How to change a materials restricted flag in a third party location.
entry.content:
Hello,


What is the process for changing a materials restricted flag from restricted to un-restricted in a third party location? The only way we have been able to make this work is by creating two separate inventory notifications, one issuing the material out and another issuing the material back in.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to change a materials restricted flag in a third...
entry.content:
To make a materials restricted flag from restricted to un-restricted in a third party location, you can follow steps below:

  1. Go to the Third-Party Logistics work center.
  2. In Common tasks select the option New Inventory Change in Externally Managed Location from the drop-down.
  3. In the opened window, fill in the required fields under the General tab.
  4. Go to the Line Items tab, select the Add Row, enter the Item ID, Reason, and Movement Direction as Inventory Issue and other required details, enter values for Product ID and Quantity columns too.
  5. Now, select Add Row button again, enter Item ID, Reason, Movement Direction as Inventory Receipt and fill in Product and Quantity columns too.
  6. For the second line item, you have to uncheck the restricted operation.
  7. Then select Save, Release and save.

entry.title: Re: Sap Public Cloud - auto population of the Confirmatio...
entry.content:
Hello,

not for all PO. but for certain PO types.

entry.title: Re: G/L account renumbering for secondary cost elements
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your question in the SAP Community blog.

SAP G/L account renumbering in CE 2502 (Cloud Edition) has strict constraints, especially around secondary cost elements (SCEs), and I’ll clarify each point for you:

 

Is it technically possible to mark "Not Used" for Secondary Cost Elements?

Yes, it is technically possible, but SAP strongly recommends against doing so unless you're absolutely certain the account is unused and not required by standard allocation processes.

  • Secondary cost elements are critical for internal cost allocations (e.g., assessments, distributions, overhead).
  • Many standard processes rely on predefined 9** accounts** (like 943000 for assessments).
  • If you mark a delivered SCE as "Not Used", it can break allocation cycles, causing runtime errors or failed job executions.

Conclusion: Only mark SCEs as Not Used if you have confirmed they are truly unused and not required by any standard app or cycle.

 

What does it mean by "MODIFY the G/L account for secondary cost elements"?

“Modify” in this context means:

  • Renumbering the SCE accounts (e.g., changing 943000 to 853000)
  • Changing account types or attributes (e.g., account type from Secondary Cost Element to Primary)
  • Altering the cost element category in a way that differs from SAP's delivery (e.g., changing category 43 – Internal Activity Allocation)

SAP Cloud Edition does not allow free design of secondary cost elements like in ECC. They must be strictly aligned with what is delivered.

Conclusion: “Modifying” SCEs includes renumbering them or altering their nature. This is not supported and can lead to functional issues.

 

Is renumbering of secondary cost elements permitted?

No, renumbering of secondary cost elements is not permitted in CE 2502.

  • All customers must use the delivered 9** series** for secondary cost elements.
  • These are pre-integrated into SAP standard allocation cycles (like overhead allocation, assessments, distributions).
  • Allocation logic often hardcodes certain cost element categories and expects specific account patterns (9*****).

Conclusion: You must retain SAP-delivered 9*** accounts for SCEs — these are mandatory and cannot be renumbered or removed.*

 

I hope this will help you answer your questions.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: How to Use Batch Specific UoM in SAP for Accurate Inventory
entry.content:
In many industries such as pharmaceuticals, food & beverage, and chemicals, it is common for the same material to vary slightly in weight or volume between batches due to manufacturing or environmental conditions. Traditional inventory management methods, which assume uniform units of measure across all batches, fall short in such scenarios. SAP addresses this challenge with the Batch Specific Unit of Measure (UoM) functionality.

Batch Specific UoM allows users to maintain batch-dependent conversion factors between different units of measure (such as between Rolls and Metre), making inventory more accurate and business operations more transparent. This feature is particularly useful when dealing with variable-weight items or when regulatory compliance requires batch-specific tracking.

Business Scenario:

A garment manufacturing company procures fabric rolls from different suppliers. Although the ordering unit is “Rolls”, each roll can differ in usable area (in m²) depending on fabric thickness, stretching, or cutting tolerance. The actual area of fabric available per roll is batch-specific and must be tracked for accurate inventory and production planning.

Problem without Batch Specific UoM:

If every roll is assumed to contain a fixed m², it leads to inaccurate raw material planning, over- or under-consumption in BOMs, and errors in stock valuation or costing. This becomes a significant issue when each roll is priced based on the usable area.

Solution with Batch Specific UoM:

By enabling Batch Specific UoM in SAP, the company can maintain the actual square meters per roll as a batch-specific conversion. During Goods Receipt, the user records the true m² of fabric in each roll, allowing the system to reflect the correct inventory in both Rolls and m². This ensures precise material consumption, correct stock values, and better production efficiency.

In the following sections of this blog, we will walk through:

  • Configuration of Batch Specific UoM via IMG paths

  • Creation of characteristics and class to store batch-specific values
  • Material master setup with proportional UoM
  • Recording batch-specific quantities during purchase and Goods Receipt
  • Viewing inventory in both base and alternative UoMs

This functionality helps businesses gain better control over variable-material inventories and supports compliance with industry-specific textile and clothing production standards.

Step 1: Create Unit Measure (Transaction: CUNI)

 
Step 2: Activate Batch Specific UoM

Path: IMG --> Logistics -General --> Batch management -->Batch specific material unit of measurement -->activate batch specific material unit of measure

Step 3: Edit Batch Specific Material UoM

Path: IMG --> Logistics -General -->Batch management -->Batch specific material unit of measurement -->Edit batch specific material unit of measure

Step 4: Define Calculation Procedure

Path: IMG --> Logistics -General -->Batch management -->Batch specific material unit of measurement -->Product Quantities Conversion --> Define Calculation of Product Quantity from Base Quantity

Step 5: Create Characteristics (Transaction: CT04)

Step 6: Create Class (Transaction: CL20)

Step 7: Create Material/Product Master data (Transaction: MM01 or App: Manage Product Master Data)

You can create a material master record using MM01 or using Manage Product master data

Assign the Class which was created in step 6

Extend the material to Plant

Create a unit of Measure

Conversion at Material Master Level

Create Product Master Data

Maintain Proportion/Product Unit (Transaction: MM02)

Save the Material CONMAT123

Step 8: Create Purchase Order (Transaction: ME21N)

PO Created 4500000455

Step 9: Post Goods Receipt (Transaction: MIGO)

Click on Distribute Quantity

Mention the Batch data and click on Adopt

Maintain Conversion in Classification for Batch B1

Maintain Conversion in Classification for Batch B2

Check and post the Document

Step 10: Check in Stock (Transaction: MMBE)

Stock in Base UoM ROL

Stock in Batch Specific UoM M2

Step 11: PO History (Transaction: ME23N)

Status tab in PO Header

PO History in PO Item Details

If you found this guide helpful, don’t miss my other SAP MM blogs covering real-world automation, configuration tips, and best practices for procurement and inventory management.

Click to view other SAP MM Blogs - SAP Community

 

Regards,

Leelamohan

entry.title: SAP GTS issue for External Scheme ID
entry.content:

We have switched to a new data provider in SAP GTS.

Do we have any easy method to define the below things?

Can anyone suggest how the External Scheme ID is configured in SAP GTS system.

We would like to know from where it's coming up and how we can update it without directly updating here.

entry.title: Re: Support user error. Your session has expired and SAP...
entry.content:
Hi JerushaLala 

Please follow the steps below:
- Restart the Database Server
- Restart the SLD Server
- Restart the Client machine

The reported issue is an application error. Check SAP Note 3358009 for this issue.

Kind Regards
Nidhi 
SAP Support

entry.title: No Foreign Currency Gain/Loss posting generated
entry.content:
In App Perform Foreign currency Valuation Error Account &1 (&2) valuated with valuation area &4 on &3 is shown in Messages 

(& placeholder for real values in run) 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: No Foreign Currency Gain/Loss posting generated
entry.content:
Check  App Verify Data Flow.

See kba 3171283 Foreign Currency Valuation indicates an Error - How To Analyse


In relation to Error "An entry is required in House bank field for account &

See kba 3216502 - S/4HANA Cloud Single Reconciliation Account for Bank Accounts Restrictions

The fields HBKID (Bank Account) and HKTID (Account ID) must be activated for G/L Balance Valuation using Configuration activity 'Activate Additional Fields for Valuations' ID 103254

entry.title: Re: PayComponentNon Recurring, OneTime Payments is it pos...
entry.content:
Hi @BhaskarNarayana 

In the role enabled for HR Manager, for the "OneTime Payments" portlet remove/uncheck "Correct" option. So it will remove edit access for the existing record in the portlet and retain Add/insert option so it will provide option to "Insert" new record. 

Thanks

Arun

entry.title: Re: How to configure sm21, st22 monitoring
entry.content: Why do you recommed to use "Number of Short Dumps on instance" over "Frequency of Short Dumps [\min]"?

entry.title: Re: Advanced Intercompany Sales MTO and Variant Configuration (7DM) in S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition
entry.content: This is a really valuable topic for many of our customers! Thanks for your explanation.

entry.title: need help with Electronic Bank Statement MT940, problem with amount in file
entry.content:
Hi expert, i need help with my MT940 file.

I'm trying to configure Electronic Bank Statement using MT940 file. i've already done configuration, and ready to upload the file. The file uploaded succesfully, but the amount posted to SAP is the wrong one. i figure the problem is from MT940 file itself.

Amount from MT 940 is "25000000 (25.000.000) rupiah". meanwhile, the real amount is only 250.000 rupiah.  How can i divide the amount by /100 so the amount posted to SAP is 250.000? or can i use string so SAP will read two last zeros as coma?

Nb: my sistem define IDR is without comma.

 

Thanks a lot for your help!

entry.title: Error Message AC166 during OAYZ configuration
entry.content: Error Message AC166 during OAYZ configuration

entry.title: Re: Mapped skills are not reflecting in skill profile
entry.content: Hi, our issue was related to the skills not appearing on the Job Profile - Job Description. Our issue was related to the other translation fields being blank. Once the other translation fields were updated the skill appeared.  Hope this may help...

entry.title: How to turn off network access logs but keep cds.log in logging on CAP?
entry.content: I noticed by default CAP logs the network access ( the logs with prefix[cds] ) as part of logging message, but we already log these from network level, how to turn it off? I searched the CAP doc no luck. I hope it only logs what we set in cds.log("...") info level - excluding the network logs.

entry.title: Re: Scripting Error in WebGUI for HTML
entry.content: Maybe the content of the script will help to identify the problem. Looks like there is backend error and instead of the JSON response on some step there is HTML returned with HTTP 500 or login page ...

entry.title: Re: Set Default Filter Value for Work Center Category in...
entry.content:
hello nishtha,

It is not technically possible to set a default value for Work Center Category in the value help of the standard Fiori app F1511A. Even if enforced, defaulting to category 0005(plant maintenance) it could lead to mismatches with work centers used by other teams like Production. Therefore, it is not recommended from both a technical and business perspective.

Thanks &regards,
Neeraj.

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio Language Layer
entry.content:
Hi bambi2913, 

Thank you for sharing your inquiry on the SAP Community! This topic should be addressed with our Product Support Team.  Please create a Product Support ticket using SAP for Me (log in with S-User ID and password), as described in this video, to have a product expert look into this specific issue. 

If you have additional questions in creating a support case, you can find more details in the SAP Signavio Onboarding Resource Center.  

All the best,

Dana
